title: Cleartrip Hotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Cleartrip Hotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, Cleartrip Hotels in Gwalior is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Cleartrip Hotels:
Cleartrip Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cleartrip Hotels!
